---
title: "06 — Distance-decay (Gaussian spatial autocorrelation)"
author: "Alexander Hobbs"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
---

<!--
Fits the Gaussian spatial autocorrelation model from Engen et al. (2005),
following Vriend et al. (2022), to characterise distance-decay of synchrony
in lay date, clutch size, and fledgling success across the Phenoweb
transect. Reproduces Table 3 and Figure 4 of the dissertation.

Parameters fitted:
  rho_0  : zero-distance synchrony
  rho_inf: synchrony at infinite distance
  l      : spatial scale parameter (km)

Inputs (data/, produced by 01_data_cleaning.Rmd and earlier scripts):
  - Blue_tits_cleaned.csv
  - site_means.csv, site_details.csv
  - Pairwise_correlations.csv (precomputed pairwise Pearson r)
  - icc_baseline.csv (output from 04_results_synchrony_iccs.Rmd)
  - site_means_with_temp.csv, climate_data.csv

Bootstrapping: parametric bootstraps (n_boot = 5000) cached as
  boot_results_aim2.rds. Random seed 42 set before the run-bootstraps chunk
  for reproducibility.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, 
                      fig.align = "center", dpi = 300)
```

```{r load-libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(broom.mixed)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(corrr)
library(reshape2)
library(ncf)
library(mvtnorm)
library(matrixStats)
library(progress)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(ggforce)
library(viridis)
library(geosphere)
```

***

# Data loading and cleaning

```{r load-data}
site_means <- read.csv(
  "data/site_means.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)

site_details <- read.csv(
  "data/site_details.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)

Blue_tits_cleaned <- read.csv(
  'data/Blue_tits_cleaned.csv',
  stringsAsFactors = TRUE, header = TRUE)

Pairwise_correlations <- read.csv(
  "data/Pairwise_correlations.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)

icc_baseline <- read.csv(
  "data/icc_baseline.csv")

site_means_with_temp <- read.csv(
  "data/site_means_with_temp.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)

climate_data <- read.csv(
  "data/climate_data.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)
```

```{r data-cleaning}
# 1. Clean site-level data
site_means <- site_means %>% 
  filter(site != "TOM")

site_details <- site_details %>% 
  filter(site != "TOM")

# 2. Clean nest-level data (Blue_tits_final)
# This removes site 'TOM' and clutch sizes > 16 (dump nests), but keeps NAs
Blue_tits_final <- Blue_tits_cleaned %>% 
  filter(site != "TOM") %>%
  filter(cs <= 16 | is.na(cs)) %>% 
  mutate(siteyear = paste(site, year))

# 3. Create subsets and site-level medians
FED_site_medians_exc2020 <- site_means %>% 
  filter(year != 2020)

FED_Blue_tits_exc_2020 <- Blue_tits_final %>% 
  filter(year != 2020)

# 4. Clean site details for spatial analysis
site_details_clean <- site_details %>%
  dplyr::select(site, Mean.Lat, Mean.Long) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Lat = Mean.Lat, Lon = Mean.Long)

# 5. Integrate climate data and scale temperature
Blue_tits_final <- Blue_tits_final %>%
  left_join(climate_data %>% select(site, year, mean_temp), by = c("site", "year")) %>%
  mutate(mean_temp_z = as.numeric(scale(mean_temp)))

FED_Blue_tits_exc_2020 <- FED_Blue_tits_exc_2020 %>%
  left_join(climate_data %>% select(site, year, mean_temp), by = c("site", "year")) %>%
  mutate(mean_temp_z = as.numeric(scale(mean_temp)))

# 6. Create site temperature summary
site_temp_summary <- climate_data %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  summarise(mean_temp_overall = mean(mean_temp, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```


```{r extract-baseline-iccs}
# Raw data ICCs (PRIMARY — reported in main results)
fed_icc2 <- icc_baseline$icc[icc_baseline$trait == "FED" & icc_baseline$model == "raw_data"]
cs_icc2  <- icc_baseline$icc[icc_baseline$trait == "CS"  & icc_baseline$model == "raw_data"]
suc_icc2 <- icc_baseline$icc[icc_baseline$trait == "SUC" & icc_baseline$model == "raw_data"]

# Site-means ICCs (SUPPLEMENTARY — reported in Appendix A6)
fed_icc  <- icc_baseline$icc[icc_baseline$trait == "FED" & icc_baseline$model == "site_means"]
cs_icc   <- icc_baseline$icc[icc_baseline$trait == "CS"  & icc_baseline$model == "site_means"]
suc_icc  <- icc_baseline$icc[icc_baseline$trait == "SUC" & icc_baseline$model == "site_means"]
```

# 3. Distance-decay of spatial synchrony — Aim 2

## 3.1 Model fitting

```{r prepare-data-function}
prepare_data <- function(x, f) {
  x %>%
    dplyr::group_by(site) %>%
    tidyr::nest() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      mod = purrr::map(.x = data, .f = ~ lm(f, data = .)),
      aug = purrr::map2(.x = mod, .y = data,
                        .f = ~ broom::augment_columns(.x, .y))
    ) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(aug) %>%
    dplyr::select(site, year, .resid) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = site, values_from = .resid) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(year) %>%
    dplyr::select(-year) %>%
    scale(.) ->
    mat
  return(mat[rowSums(!is.na(mat)) > 1, ])
}
```

```{r prepare-trait-matrices}
mat_fed_detrended <- prepare_data(
  x = FED_site_medians_exc2020 %>% select(site, year, median_fed) %>% drop_na(),
  f = formula(median_fed ~ year))

mat_cs_detrended <- prepare_data(
  x = site_means %>% select(site, year, mean_cs) %>% drop_na(),
  f = formula(mean_cs ~ year))

mat_suc_detrended <- prepare_data(
  x = site_means %>% select(site, year, mean_suc) %>% drop_na(),
  f = formula(mean_suc ~ year))
```

```{r calculate-distances}
calculate_distances <- function(x, y) {
  l <- x %>% dplyr::filter(site %in% colnames(y))
  dist <- ncf::gcdist(x = l$Lon, y = l$Lat)
  return(dist)
}

dist_fed <- calculate_distances(x = site_details_clean, y = mat_fed_detrended)
dist_cs  <- calculate_distances(x = site_details_clean, y = mat_cs_detrended)
dist_suc <- calculate_distances(x = site_details_clean, y = mat_suc_detrended)
```

```{r spatial-synchrony-function}
calculate_sp_syn <- function(x, d, start, boot_prog = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(boot_prog)) { boot_prog$tick() }
  gauss_sp_autocorr <- function(par, x, d) {
    rho.0   <- exp(par[1]) / (1 + exp(par[1]))
    rho.inf <- rho.0 * exp(par[2]) / (1 + exp(par[2]))
    l       <- exp(par[3])
    logLL <- 0
    for (i in 1:nrow(x)) {
      xx  <- x[i, ]
      sel <- !is.na(xx)
      dsel <- d[sel, sel]
      xx   <- xx[sel]
      mu <- rep(0, length(xx))
      sigma <- (rho.0 - rho.inf) * exp(-(dsel^2) / (2 * l^2)) + rho.inf
      diag(sigma) <- 1
      logLL <- logLL + -sum(mvtnorm::dmvnorm(x = xx, mean = mu, sigma = sigma, log = TRUE))
    }
    return(logLL)
  }
  num_opt <- optim(start, gauss_sp_autocorr, x = x, d = d)
  par_est <- list(
    rho.0   = exp(num_opt$par[1]) / (1 + exp(num_opt$par[1])),
    rho.inf = exp(num_opt$par[1]) / (1 + exp(num_opt$par[1])) *
              exp(num_opt$par[2]) / (1 + exp(num_opt$par[2])),
    l       = exp(num_opt$par[3])
  )
  return(list(start = start, num_opt = num_opt, par_est = par_est))
}
```

```{r run-spatial-synchrony-models}
start <- c(log(0.75 / (1 - 0.75)), log(0.1 / (1 - 0.1)), log(500))
ss_fed <- calculate_sp_syn(x = mat_fed_detrended, d = dist_fed, start = start)
ss_cs  <- calculate_sp_syn(x = mat_cs_detrended,  d = dist_cs,  start = start)
ss_suc <- calculate_sp_syn(x = mat_suc_detrended, d = dist_suc, start = start)
```

```{r gauss-equation}
gauss_sp_autocorr_eq <- function(rho.0, rho.inf, d, l) {
  (rho.0 - rho.inf) * exp(-(d^2) / (2 * l^2)) + rho.inf
}
```

## 3.2 Bootstrapping

```{r bootstrap-function}
bootstrap_sp_syn <- function(x, y, d, start, n) {
  start.time <- Sys.time()
  rho.0 <- y$par_est$rho.0; rho.inf <- y$par_est$rho.inf; l <- y$par_est$l
  sigma <- (rho.0 - rho.inf) * exp(-(d^2) / (2 * l^2)) + rho.inf
  diag(sigma) <- 1
  pb1 <- progress::progress_bar$new(total = n, format = "Drawing [:bar] :percent ~:eta remaining", clear = FALSE)
  cat(paste0("\nDrawing ", n, " bootstrap replicates...\n"))
  boot <- list()
  for (i in 1:n) {
    pb1$tick()
    rep <- mvtnorm::rmvnorm(n = nrow(x), mean = rep(0, nrow(sigma)), sigma = sigma)
    rep[is.na(x)] <- NA
    boot[[i]] <- rep
  }
  pb2 <- progress::progress_bar$new(total = n, format = "Fitting  [:bar] :percent ~:eta remaining", clear = FALSE)
  cat("\nRe-estimating parameters on each bootstrap replicate...\n")
  ss_boot <- purrr::map(.x = boot, .f = ~ calculate_sp_syn(x = .x, d = d, start = start, boot_prog = pb2))
  time <- difftime(Sys.time(), start.time, units = "min")
  cat(paste0("\nAll ", n, " bootstraps completed in ", round(time, 2), " minutes\n"))
  return(list(output = ss_boot, time = time))
}
```

```{r run-bootstraps, cache=TRUE}
set.seed(42)
# Run only if the saved file doesn't exist yet
if (!file.exists("boot_results_aim2.rds")) {
  n_boot <- 5000
  boot_fed <- bootstrap_sp_syn(x = mat_fed_detrended, y = ss_fed, 
                                d = dist_fed, start = start, n = n_boot)
  boot_cs  <- bootstrap_sp_syn(x = mat_cs_detrended,  y = ss_cs,  
                                d = dist_cs,  start = start, n = n_boot)
  boot_suc <- bootstrap_sp_syn(x = mat_suc_detrended, y = ss_suc, 
                                d = dist_suc, start = start, n = n_boot)
  
  saveRDS(list(boot_fed = boot_fed, 
               boot_cs  = boot_cs, 
               boot_suc = boot_suc,
               n_boot   = n_boot), 
          "boot_results_aim2.rds")
}

# Always load from file
boots     <- readRDS("boot_results_aim2.rds")
boot_fed  <- boots$boot_fed
boot_cs   <- boots$boot_cs
boot_suc  <- boots$boot_suc
n_boot    <- boots$n_boot
```

## 3.3 Distance-decay results

```{r bootstrap-parameter-summary}
extract_boot_params <- function(boot_output, trait_label) {
  dplyr::bind_rows(purrr::map(boot_output$output, 3)) %>% mutate(Trait = trait_label)
}
boot_params <- bind_rows(
  extract_boot_params(boot_fed, "Lay date"),
  extract_boot_params(boot_cs,  "Clutch size"),
  extract_boot_params(boot_suc, "Fledgling success"))

boot_summary <- boot_params %>%
  mutate(Trait = factor(Trait, levels = c("Lay date", "Clutch size", "Fledgling success"))) %>%
  group_by(Trait) %>%
  summarise(
    `Median`   = round(median(rho.0), 3),
    `95% CI`   = paste0("[", round(quantile(rho.0, 0.025), 3), ", ",
                         round(quantile(rho.0, 0.975), 3), "]"),
    `Median ` = round(median(rho.inf), 3),
    `95% CI ` = paste0("[", round(quantile(rho.inf, 0.025), 3), ", ",
                         round(quantile(rho.inf, 0.975), 3), "]"),
    `Median  `  = round(median(l), 1),
    `95% CI  `  = paste0("[", round(quantile(l, 0.025), 1), ", ",
                          round(quantile(l, 0.975), 1), "]")
  )

kable(boot_summary, align = "lcccccc",
      caption = paste0("**Table 3.** Bootstrapped parameter estimates for the Gaussian spatial autocorrelation model (n = ", n_boot, ").")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")) %>%
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, 
                     "ρ₀ (zero-distance)" = 2, 
                     "ρ∞ (infinite-distance)" = 2, 
                     "l (spatial scale, km)" = 2))
```
```{r inline-CI-code}
# ρ₀ CIs
fed_rho0_ci <- paste0("[", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.0[boot_params$Trait == "Lay date"], 0.025), 3), ", ", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.0[boot_params$Trait == "Lay date"], 0.975), 3), "]")
cs_rho0_ci <- paste0("[", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.0[boot_params$Trait == "Clutch size"], 0.025), 3), ", ", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.0[boot_params$Trait == "Clutch size"], 0.975), 3), "]")
suc_rho0_ci <- paste0("[", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.0[boot_params$Trait == "Fledgling success"], 0.025), 3), ", ", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.0[boot_params$Trait == "Fledgling success"], 0.975), 3), "]")

# ρ∞ CIs
fed_rho.inf_ci <- paste0("[", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.inf[boot_params$Trait == "Lay date"], 0.025), 3), ", ", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.inf[boot_params$Trait == "Lay date"], 0.975), 3), "]")
cs_rho.inf_ci <- paste0("[", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.inf[boot_params$Trait == "Clutch size"], 0.025), 3), ", ", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.inf[boot_params$Trait == "Clutch size"], 0.975), 3), "]")
suc_rho.inf_ci <- paste0("[", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.inf[boot_params$Trait == "Fledgling success"], 0.025), 3), ", ", round(quantile(boot_params$rho.inf[boot_params$Trait == "Fledgling success"], 0.975), 3), "]")

# l CIs (whole numbers for km)
fed_l_ci <- paste0("[", round(quantile(boot_params$l[boot_params$Trait == "Lay date"], 0.025), 0), ", ", round(quantile(boot_params$l[boot_params$Trait == "Lay date"], 0.975), 0), "]")
cs_l_ci <- paste0("[", round(quantile(boot_params$l[boot_params$Trait == "Clutch size"], 0.025), 0), ", ", round(quantile(boot_params$l[boot_params$Trait == "Clutch size"], 0.975), 0), "]")
suc_l_ci <- paste0("[", round(quantile(boot_params$l[boot_params$Trait == "Fledgling success"], 0.025), 0), ", ", round(quantile(boot_params$l[boot_params$Trait == "Fledgling success"], 0.975), 0), "]")
```


```{r plot-bootstrap-function}
plot_bootstrap_sp_syn <- function(x, y, d, trait_label, trait_colour = "steelblue") {
  boot <- dplyr::bind_rows(purrr::map(y$output, 3))
  ss_curves <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(boot$rho.0, boot$rho.inf, boot$l),
    .f = ~ gauss_sp_autocorr_eq(..1, ..2, seq(0, max(d), length.out = 2000), ..3)
  ) %>% do.call(rbind, .)
  syn_data <- tibble(
    Dist   = seq(0, max(d), length.out = 2000),
    Low    = matrixStats::colQuantiles(x = ss_curves, probs = 0.025),
    Median = matrixStats::colQuantiles(x = ss_curves, probs = 0.5),
    High   = matrixStats::colQuantiles(x = ss_curves, probs = 0.975))
  cor_data <- tibble(
    Corr = corrr::stretch(corrr::correlate(x))$r,
    Dist = reshape2::melt(data = d)$value) %>% drop_na()
  ggplot() +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray70", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_point(data = cor_data, aes(x = Dist, y = Corr), color = "black", alpha = 0.08, size = 1.5) +
    geom_ribbon(data = syn_data, aes(x = Dist, ymin = Low, ymax = High), fill = trait_colour, alpha = 0.3, linetype = 0) +
    geom_line(data = syn_data, aes(x = Dist, y = Median), color = trait_colour, linewidth = 1.1) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-1, 1), breaks = seq(-1, 1, by = 0.25)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
    labs(title = trait_label, x = "Distance (km)", y = "Correlation") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 13, base_family = "Palatino") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", family = "Palatino", size = 14))
}
```

```{r figure-5-bootstraps, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 5, fig.cap = "**Figure 5.** Bootstrapped Gaussian distance-decay curves for spatial synchrony in (a) lay date, (b) clutch size, and (c) fledgling success. Solid coloured line = median; shaded area surrounding curve = 95% CI. Grey points = raw pairwise correlations between detrended site time series."}
p_fed_boot <- plot_bootstrap_sp_syn(mat_fed_detrended, boot_fed, dist_fed, "Lay date",          "steelblue")
p_cs_boot  <- plot_bootstrap_sp_syn(mat_cs_detrended,  boot_cs,  dist_cs,  "Clutch size",       "#57A85A")
p_suc_boot <- plot_bootstrap_sp_syn(mat_suc_detrended, boot_suc, dist_suc, "Fledgling success", "#E07B4F")

p_fed_boot + p_cs_boot + p_suc_boot +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a",
                  tag_prefix = "(", tag_suffix = ")") &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 12, family = "Palatino", face = "bold"))
```

***
